_comment: Default NRVA configuration committed to the repo. Layered config order (highest priority first): (1) workflow_dispatch nr_overrides JSON input, (2) GitHub Actions repo vars (vars.NEW_RELIC_*), (3) per_leg block here, (4) global block here, (5) hard-coded defaults in NewRelicSetup.swift / run-playback.sh. Sensitive values (NEW_RELIC_APP_TOKEN) come from secrets.* — NEVER from this file.

iOS-16-iPhone-14._comment: iOS 16 + corp gateway is slower; longer harvest avoids backlog

tvOS-18-Apple-TV-4K._comment: Apple TV is constrained; opt into memory mode
